warnings: 同一根 1m bar 同时触发 stop/take-profit，保守按 stop first 处理

policies.notes: Signal time immediate entry at trace price.
Wait one 1m bar; enter at that bar close only if close still confirms the breakout side.
Wait three 1m bars; enter at the third bar close only if close still confirms the breakout side.
Wait up to five 1m bars for a pullback touch of the original breakout level.
Wait up to ten 1m bars for a pullback touch of the original breakout level.
Wait three 1m bars; enter only after at least 0.25 ATR favorable follow-through.
Use the first three 1m bars as a gate; skip early 1 ATR adverse-first profiles.

Wait three 1m bars; enter at the third bar close only if close still confirms the breakout side.

Wait three 1m bars; enter only after at least 0.25 ATR favorable follow-through.
